title: Create-ive Chaos
description: constructive catastrophe is a modpack that includes the Create mod and other mods to enhance gameplay. The modpack features similar to Towny. Players can build and manage their own towns, claim territories.
body:
# Constructive Catastrophe Modpack

##### This Modpack is for an SMP. Join Our [Discord](https://Discord.gg/invite/cH9pjSjtf2) If you want to be whitelisted!

Constructive Catastrophe is a modpack that includes the *Create* mod and other mods to enhance gameplay. The modpack features a plugin similar to *Towny*, but adapted to the modded ecosystem. Players can build and manage their own towns, claim territories, and engage in politics with other players. The modpack also includes various other mods that offer new blocks, items, and creatures to interact with, adding depth and variety to the gameplay. 

Overall, ***Constructive Catastrophe*** offers players an engaging and immersive experience in a modded ecosystem.

Features & Planned to be Features
- [ ] Placeholder
- [x] [VS Clockwork addon](https://discord.com/channels/244934352092397568/1100497495450210384/1100497613977034787)
